query:
SELECT 
    p.name as partner_name,
    c.name as city_name,
    pc.contractStatus,
    pc.currentProfitStage,
    pc.brandUsageFee
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name IN ('福州', '泉州', '无锡', '郑州')
ORDER BY c.name;
